changes: Initial release of the Texture Browser plugin.
Browse textures from any local folder in a responsive thumbnail grid.
Smart filter: glob patterns (*.png, brick_*) and plain substring matching.
One-click texture assignment to all selected faces across all selected meshes.
Native toolbar with path input, filter input, Browse/Refresh actions, and Only Used toggle.
Configurable scan depth (1–10), thumbnail size (10%–200%), and orphan texture cleanup.
Full undo/redo support including restoration of cleaned-up orphan textures.
Uses Blockbench 5.0 native APIs (requireNativeModule, Toolbar, Panel).
